text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm spending the evening planning out Special
Week's training, when...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hello? Ah, Trainer! I knew you'd be here.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I stopped by your room to give you some of the
carrots my mom just sent me, but you weren't
there.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So I thought you might still be working... and here
you are.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Special Week takes a look at what I'm doing.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, that's my training regimen.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You're working so late into the night just for my
sake?
choice_data_list: It's because I want to help you win.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You always do so much for me... You're way too
kind...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um, is there anything else I can do? What if I go
for a run along the riverbank?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I wanna do anything I can to win! Just sitting
around isn't gonna cut it!
choice_data_list: Well then, how about some extra training?!
You should rest up and prepare for tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I wanna do anything I can to win! Just sitting
around isn't gonna cut it!
choice_data_list: Well then, how about some extra training?!
Well then, how about some extra training?!
You should rest up and prepare for tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! All righty! Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Have you got a new training regimen ready for
me?! I'm excited to see what's in store!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, wait. I'm still in my uniform, haha! Let me go
get changed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That evening, Special Week runs as much as her
body allows, as if she's letting out all of her
emotions on the track.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You don't want me to do anything? But I
can't get ready for tomorrow if...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, now I see! We're gonna start the new training regimen that you're working on now, tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Roger that! I'll head back to the dorm and get to
sleep right away then!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Sock it to me with all you've got tomorrow! See
ya!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Whoops. I almost forgot! Good night, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day, when training begins...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Let's get right to it!
choice_data_list: Why do you have your signature racewear on?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'm just really motivated right now!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Take a good look, Trainer. This is the
Umamusume you're in charge of.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I came to this academy all the way from
Hokkaido, and I've grown to become the capable
racer that I am today.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ever since I met you, I've been able to run like
this...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So, I wanna show my thanks by becoming the top
Umamusume in all of Japan!
choice_data_list:
I'll keep supporting you until your dream comes
true.

I'll keep supporting you until your dream comes
true.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Please and thank you! All righty, time to crush
another training session!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week, flashy as ever, is cheered on by the
other Umamusume as she starts to run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's almost like they've already acknowledged her
as the top Umamusume in all of Japan.
